description_long: This humanoid robot has a skeletal, dragon-like appearance with a robust, armored body and a menacing presence. Its exterior is primarily composed of bone-white segments, with a ribbed chest, spiked shell, and large, clawed hands and feet. The back features a dark, hexagonal shell adorned with prominent, conical spikes and bordered by a pale rim. The head is characterized by a pronounced snout, sharp teeth, red eyes, and a vivid red, flame-like crest atop its skull, flanked by two horns. The arms and legs are segmented and jointed, with spiked cuffs around the wrists and ankles, suggesting mechanical articulation. The overall design is both intimidating and functional, blending organic and robotic elements for a striking urban presence.
description: A skeletal, dragon-like humanoid robot with a spiked shell, bone-white armor, and a red flame crest, featuring articulated limbs and a menacing visage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the ribbed chest, symmetrical arms outstretched, red crest, and facial features including horns and sharp teeth.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the snout, jaw, and the layered, spiked shell extending from the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full shell with hexagonal pattern and spikes, as well as the tail and back of the head and limbs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the jawline, shell spikes, and the segmented limbs from the opposite profile.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and slightly apart, head facing forward, and torso erect.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; exterior consists of integrated, bone-like armor plating, spiked shell, and decorative red crest.
attribute_facial_features: Face features a pronounced snout, sharp angular jaw, visible teeth, two horns, deep-set red eyes, and a red flame-like crest; no visible mouth movement or display screens.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs are segmented with visible joints at shoulders, elbows, wrists, hips, knees, and ankles; hands and feet have articulated digits; joints appear to allow for a wide range of motion.
